title: GENMON
description: Optimized Cobblemon modpack designed for smooth gameplay, featuring enhanced performance, full battle mechanics, and essential quality-of-life tools.
body:
Genmon is a refined and optimized Cobblemon modpack, delivering a smooth, immersive, and balanced Pokémon experience for every type of trainer!

We’ve combined the most essential performance, exploration, and battle-enhancing features into one seamless adventure.

Main Features:

💥 Radical Trainers: Challenge intelligent AI trainers scattered across the world — each with unique teams and strategies.

🌿 Cobblemon Pasture Loot: Collect automatic rewards from pastures and natural habitats as you explore and expand your world.

🪑 Full Decoration Support: Customize your base and give your world personality with a massive variety of decorative blocks and furniture.

⚔️ Complete Battle System: Experience the excitement of Mega Evolutions, Z-Moves, and Gigantamax, fully integrated through Mega Showdown and Genesis Forms.

🗺️ Enhanced Exploration: Navigate and discover your surroundings with Xaero’s Minimap, Nature’s Compass, and Cobblepedia — making exploration intuitive and rewarding.

🌟 For True Trainers: Whether you’re building your dream team, battling rivals, or crafting the perfect home, Genmon delivers the ultimate Cobblemon experience — optimized, stable, and ready for adventure!
